Details: Based on isotherm studies, adsorption of 4-nonylphenol from water to granular activated carbon (GAC) can be very effective. One study reported coal-based GAC was more effective than other types due to its large pore volume. Another study showed that the presence of dissolved humic acids (DHA) can lower 4-nonylphenol adsorption onto GAC. Adsorption capacity decreased with duration of operation; the extent depended on carbon type and years of the operation.
